name: orca
description: Spawn, fork, message, or follow Claude Code and Codex agent instances in cmux tabs from Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Spawn, fork, or message Claude Code and Codex agent instances in cmux tabs.
interface.longDescription: Orca packages skills for launching fresh AI coding workers, forking existing provider conversations into cmux tabs, or messaging an existing agent surface.
defaultPrompt: Spawn a Codex worker for this task
Hand this bug to Claude Code in cmux
Fork this Codex conversation in a new cmux tab
Send a follow-up to the Claude agent in this workspace
